Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[ defName="Alligator" or defName="MonitorLizard" or defName="SeaTurtle" or defName="Bullfrog" or defName="ColossusToad" or defName="HermitCrab" or defName="StoneCrab" or defName="LavaSnail" ]/lifeStageAges/li/def[text()="AnimalBaby"]
